text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Bilateral acute otitis externa.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Prescribed: Augmentin 1 g tablet: 1 tablet x 2 times a day for 7 days; Prescribed: Bentelan 1 mg tablet: 1 tablet x 2 times a day for 4 days on a full stomach; Prescribed: UNicexal vial: 1 vial in right and left ear x 2 times a day for 7 days.", 0.0, 0.5)
